townsperson_missing_mesh: Level: required Manny skeletal mesh is missing; townsperson will not render.
townsperson_missing_animation: Level: required ABP_Unarmed animation blueprint is missing; townsperson animation is unavailable.
horse_missing_mesh: Level: required imported horse mesh is missing; horse actor %s cannot render.
horse_missing_walk_animation: Level: required horse walk animation is missing for %s.
rider_missing_walk_animation: Level: required mounted rider walk animation is missing for %s.
rider_missing_mesh: Level: required mounted rider mesh is missing for %s.
startup_sdk_enabled: ForbocAIDemo: Redux logger active. Filter the Output Log by LogForbocAI to inspect protocol actions and state deltas.
startup_sdk_disabled: ForbocAIDemo: UE SDK feature gate closed. Running offline French Gulch prototype.
